name: Omon.dfeosSouth30
title: Surface Dissolved Iron Concentration
description: dissolved iron in sea water is meant to include both Fe2+ and Fe3+ ions (but not, e.g., particulate detrital iron)
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.dfeosSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
